channel.title: Dexter Season Alerts
channel.description: New season notifications for Dexter from TVmaze metadata.

item.title: Season 8 — Premieres 2013-06-30
item.description: Premiere: 2013-06-30 | Finale: 2013-09-22 | Episodes: 12 | Network: Paramount+ with Showtime
